hero.title: We build silent infrastructure for the human mind.
hero.subline: Digital sovereignty through calm systems, privacy, and attention-respecting design.

identity.label: Identity
identity.text: LIAORA is an independent initiative dedicated to digital sovereignty. With Sovereign Unit Alpha (V6.0), we provide a system that protects intellectual freedom through recursive memory and neuromorphic reflexes.

items.title: Silence by Design
items.text: Technology should be present when needed and invisible when not.

items.title: Radical Sovereignty
items.text: Your data, your device, your memory. No hidden dependencies.

items.title: Clarity over Velocity
items.text: We prefer explainable systems over fast chaos.

items.title: Human attention is sacred
items.text: We reject engagement as a metric.

origin.label: Origin
origin.quote: Form follows thought — and thought needs silence.

status.label: Current State
status.text: Sovereign Unit Alpha (V6.0) is operational. Deep Memory (RLM) and Neuro-Core Baseline.

liability.title: Liability for Content
liability.text: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws per § 7 Paragraph 1 TMG.

copyright.title: Copyright
copyright.text: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Protecting your data is important to us.

general.title: 1. General
general.text: This website is for information purposes only. No user registration, tracking, or profiling takes place.

logs.title: 2. Server Logs
logs.text: When accessing the website, technically necessary data may be processed temporarily.

cookies.title: 3. Cookies
cookies.text: This website does not use cookies.

thirdParty.title: 4. Third Parties
thirdParty.text: No external tracking, analysis, or marketing services are used.

contact.title: 5. Contact
contact.text: When contacting us via email, the transmitted data is used exclusively to process the request.
